summary: Iteration 23: Editor Improvements Testing Complete. All 24 tests pass (9 backend + 15 frontend). Tested: 1) Lists (bullet/numbered) display correctly in editor and article view via .prose CSS styling, 2) Fullscreen editor opens properly with fixed toolbar that doesn't overlap content area, 3) Multi-image upload dialog opens from toolbar and accepts multiple files, 4) Multi-image upload API works and auto-creates 'Bilder' folder, 5) HTML editor mode shows raw HTML textarea with apply/cancel buttons.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user marc.hansen@canusa.de. Test images created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editor improvements fully tested. All four features implemented and working: (1) Lists display via .prose CSS class in index.css lines 261-276 and .ProseMirror styles lines 328-347, (2) Fullscreen editor uses flex layout to prevent toolbar overlap, (3) Multi-image upload creates 'Bilder' folder automatically in documents, (4) HTML editor shows raw HTML with apply/cancel buttons.

lists_display.details: CSS rules in index.css (.prose ul/ol and .ProseMirror ul/ol) ensure list-style-type is set for disc/decimal. ArticleView uses 'prose' class on content div.

fullscreen_editor.details: FullscreenEditor.jsx uses flex layout with flex-shrink-0 header and flex-1 content area. Toolbar does not overlap editor content.

multi_image_upload.details: API POST /api/images/upload-multiple accepts multiple files, creates 'Bilder' folder in documents if save_to_documents=true. Returns uploaded array with image_id and url.

html_editor_mode.details: HTML button in toolbar toggles HTML mode showing textarea with raw HTML content. Apply button updates editor content, Cancel returns to visual mode.
